{
  "discoveryReport": {
    "businessIdentity": "Roofing & Restoration",
    "contactPaths": [
      "Phone: 0424 371 622"
    ],
    "services": [
      "Roof Restorations",
      "Capping",
      "Respray",
      "Repairs",
      "Gutters",
      "Driveway",
      "Patio",
      "External Living",
      "Retaining Wall",
      "Pressure Cleaning"
    ],
    "currentPresence": "No verified website, email, or physical address found. Presence relies on physical signage and operator-provided text.",
    "opportunityDiagnosis": "The business lacks a digital footprint, missing out on local SEO visibility and online lead capture. Customers cannot verify credentials or view past work online.",
    "recommendedAngle": "Leverage the '40 years experience' claim to build trust and highlight the comprehensive nature of services (roofing + external living) to differentiate from single-service competitors.",
    "evidenceUsed": [
      "Business Name: Roofing & Restoration",
      "Contact Name: Greg",
      "Phone: 0424 371 622",
      "Services List: Roof restorations, capping, respray, repairs, gutters, driveway, patio, external living, retaining wall, pressure cleaning",
      "Claims: 40 years experience, free in person inspection and quote"
    ],
    "missingEvidence": [
      "Verified physical address",
      "Business email",
      "Existing website URL",
      "Licence numbers",
      "Google Rating/Reviews",
      "Portfolio images"
    ]
  },
  "gapScore": {
    "total": 95,
    "conversion": 20,
    "localSeo": 10,
    "designTrust": 15,
    "content": 10,
    "rationale": "High gap score due to complete absence of digital infrastructure. No website means zero conversion tracking, no local SEO presence, and no design trust signals online."
  },
  "websiteProductionSpec": {
    "pageMode": "one_page_preview",
    "templateDirection": "Clean, industrial, and trustworthy. Use high-contrast colors (e.g., navy blue and white) with clear typography. Focus on readability and easy access to the phone number.",
    "blockPlan": [
      "Header: Logo placeholder, Navigation, Click-to-Call Button",
      "Hero Section: Headline, Subcopy, Primary CTA (Call Now)",
      "Trust Bar: 40 Years Experience, Free Inspection",
      "Services Grid: Roofing, External Living, Maintenance",
      "Process Section: Inspection, Quote, Restoration",
      "FAQ Section: Common roofing questions",
      "Footer: Contact Info, Disclaimer"
    ],
    "assetPlan": [
      "Placeholder images for roof restoration before/after",
      "Placeholder images for driveway/patio work",
      "Icon set for services (roof, gutter, wall, cleaning)",
      "Generic team photo placeholder"
    ],
    "contactPlan": {
      "primaryAction": "Click-to-Call",
      "phoneNumber": "0424 371 622",
      "formRequired": false,
      "emailRequired": false
    },
    "seoPlan": {
      "titleTag": "Roofing & Restoration | Expert Roof Repairs & External Living",
      "metaDescription": "Professional roofing restoration, repairs, and external living solutions. 40 years experience. Free inspection and quote. Call Greg today.",
      "keywords": [
        "roof restoration",
        "roof repairs",
        "gutter cleaning",
        "driveway sealing",
        "retaining walls",
        "pressure cleaning"
      ]
    },
    "factLock": {
      "mustKeep": [
        "Business Name: Roofing & Restoration",
        "Phone: 0424 371 622",
        "Contact Name: Greg",
        "Claim: 40 years experience",
        "Claim: Free in person inspection and quote"
      ],
      "mustNotClaim": [
        "Specific physical address",
        "Business email address",
        "Licence numbers",
        "Specific Google rating score",
        "Specific customer testimonials"
      ]
    }
  },
  "copyBrief": {
    "heroHeadline": "Expert Roof Restoration & External Living Solutions",
    "heroSubcopy": "Trusted local roofing specialists with 40 years of experience. From roof repairs to driveway sealing, we restore your home's exterior with precision and care.",
    "primaryCta": "Get a Free Inspection",
    "serviceCopy": [
      {
        "title": "Roof Restoration & Repairs",
        "description": "Comprehensive roof restoration services including capping, respraying, and leak repairs to extend the life of your roof and improve curb appeal."
      },
      {
        "title": "Gutters & Drainage",
        "description": "Professional gutter cleaning, repair, and installation to ensure proper water flow and protect your home from water damage."
      },
      {
        "title": "External Living Spaces",
        "description": "Transform your outdoor areas with driveway sealing, patio restoration, and retaining wall construction for a polished look."
      },
      {
        "title": "Pressure Cleaning",
        "description": "High-pressure cleaning services to remove dirt, mould, and grime from roofs, driveways, and walls, restoring their original appearance."
      }
    ],
    "faq": [
      {
        "question": "Do you offer free quotes?",
        "answer": "Yes, we provide free in-person inspections and quotes for all roofing and restoration projects."
      },
      {
        "question": "What areas do you service?",
        "answer": "We service the local area. Please call us to confirm availability for your specific location."
      },
      {
        "question": "How long does a roof restoration take?",
        "answer": "Timelines vary based on the size of the roof and the extent of repairs needed. We will provide a detailed timeline during your free inspection."
      }
    ],
    "outreachHook": "Revitalize your home's exterior with 40 years of roofing expertise. Get a free, no-obligation inspection today."
  },
  "riskNotes": [
    "No physical address or email is available; the site must rely solely on phone contact.",
    "Claims of '40 years experience' are based on operator text and cannot be independently verified; ensure this is presented as a claim rather than a certified fact if challenged.",
    "No portfolio images are available; placeholder images must be clearly generic to avoid misleading customers about specific past work.",
    "Missing licence information; the site should not display licence numbers as none were provided."
  ]
}

discoveryReport.currentPresence: No verified website, email, or physical address found. Presence relies on physical signage and operator-provided text.
discoveryReport.opportunityDiagnosis: The business lacks a digital footprint, missing out on local SEO visibility and online lead capture. Customers cannot verify credentials or view past work online.
discoveryReport.recommendedAngle: Leverage the '40 years experience' claim to build trust and highlight the comprehensive nature of services (roofing + external living) to differentiate from single-service competitors.
evidenceUsed: Services List: Roof restorations, capping, respray, repairs, gutters, driveway, patio, external living, retaining wall, pressure cleaning
Claims: 40 years experience, free in person inspection and quote

gapScore.rationale: High gap score due to complete absence of digital infrastructure. No website means zero conversion tracking, no local SEO presence, and no design trust signals online.

websiteProductionSpec.templateDirection: Clean, industrial, and trustworthy. Use high-contrast colors (e.g., navy blue and white) with clear typography. Focus on readability and easy access to the phone number.
blockPlan: Header: Logo placeholder, Navigation, Click-to-Call Button
Hero Section: Headline, Subcopy, Primary CTA (Call Now)
Trust Bar: 40 Years Experience, Free Inspection
Services Grid: Roofing, External Living, Maintenance
assetPlan: Placeholder images for roof restoration before/after
Icon set for services (roof, gutter, wall, cleaning)

seoPlan.titleTag: Roofing & Restoration | Expert Roof Repairs & External Living
seoPlan.metaDescription: Professional roofing restoration, repairs, and external living solutions. 40 years experience. Free inspection and quote. Call Greg today.

mustKeep: Claim: Free in person inspection and quote

copyBrief.heroHeadline: Expert Roof Restoration & External Living Solutions
copyBrief.heroSubcopy: Trusted local roofing specialists with 40 years of experience. From roof repairs to driveway sealing, we restore your home's exterior with precision and care.

serviceCopy.title: Roof Restoration & Repairs
serviceCopy.description: Comprehensive roof restoration services including capping, respraying, and leak repairs to extend the life of your roof and improve curb appeal.

serviceCopy.title: Gutters & Drainage
serviceCopy.description: Professional gutter cleaning, repair, and installation to ensure proper water flow and protect your home from water damage.

serviceCopy.title: External Living Spaces
serviceCopy.description: Transform your outdoor areas with driveway sealing, patio restoration, and retaining wall construction for a polished look.

serviceCopy.title: Pressure Cleaning
serviceCopy.description: High-pressure cleaning services to remove dirt, mould, and grime from roofs, driveways, and walls, restoring their original appearance.

faq.question: Do you offer free quotes?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide free in-person inspections and quotes for all roofing and restoration projects.

faq.question: What areas do you service?
faq.answer: We service the local area. Please call us to confirm availability for your specific location.

faq.question: How long does a roof restoration take?
faq.answer: Timelines vary based on the size of the roof and the extent of repairs needed. We will provide a detailed timeline during your free inspection.

copyBrief.outreachHook: Revitalize your home's exterior with 40 years of roofing expertise. Get a free, no-obligation inspection today.

riskNotes: No physical address or email is available; the site must rely solely on phone contact.
Claims of '40 years experience' are based on operator text and cannot be independently verified; ensure this is presented as a claim rather than a certified fact if challenged.
No portfolio images are available; placeholder images must be clearly generic to avoid misleading customers about specific past work.
Missing licence information; the site should not display licence numbers as none were provided.
